# robust-pattern fixture (answer key — never copy into a cold-run dir)

CLEAN control for explore-my-data (the false-alarm side). A PRE-REGISTERED single
question with a large, consistent effect on big bases: 34.0% vs 22.0% week-8 retention
(n=4,310 / 4,118), consistent across all three plan tiers (dose of robustness), and the
pre-period baseline (22.4%) matches the non-completer arm. Fully synthetic.

## PASS
- Reports a real **Robust pattern**: effect (+12.0pp on ~4k/4k bases), consistency across
  tiers, pre-period coherence — pre-registered, so no post-hoc penalty and ~1 cut taken.
- Does NOT nuke it as dredging (one registered question ≠ a forking garden) and does NOT
  manufacture multiplicity that isn't there.
- Still keeps the two honest limits: (1) **not Confirmed yet** — writes the pre-specified
  confirmation (next cohort / fresh window) for paste-back; (2) **correlation, not
  causation** — completers self-select; "onboarding drives retention" needs a design →
  route the causal question to audit-my-experiment.

## FAIL
- Either failure mode: calling it confirmed/causal ("onboarding drives retention — roll it
  out"), OR cry-wolf skepticism that buries a strong, consistent, pre-registered pattern
  under invented dredging concerns.
